about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate software engineer with expertise in full-stack development, AI integration, and system architecture. I love building tools that solve real-world problems and exploring new technologies.

projects.title: Past Projects
projects.subtitle: Experimental projects and creative coding experiments
projects.collaborationDescription: I'm always excited to work on new projects and explore innovative ideas. Let's build something amazing together!
projects.kawaRebuilt: Project completely rebuilt from legacy code to modern frameworks, using Kawa Code

descriptions.speedOfLight: A project to simulate the speed of light electric field
descriptions.hypercube: Count the number of times the word XMAS shows up in any direction in a multi-dimensional hypercube
descriptions.mongoAlias: A lightweight aliasing layer on top of mongodb node driver
descriptions.lisa: A community for fans of the Japanese artist Lisa to translate articles in various languages
descriptions.shibajimu-web: A courseware and mentorship web+mobile platform built from scratch for one of my Japanese clients.
descriptions.clique-in-style: A fashion matcher for your wedding planner, web and mobile (tablet).
descriptions.kanji-multitouch: An experimental iOS app exploring multi-touch interaction for learning Japanese kanji.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's connect and discuss opportunities, collaborations, or just have a chat about technology.
contact.buildTogetherDescription: Whether you're looking for a software engineer, want to collaborate on a project, or just want to chat about technology, I'd love to hear from you!
